seoTitle: Jalbarragup vs Jaloran — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jalbarragup and Jaloran. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jalbarragup and Jaloran.
heading: Jalbarragup vs Jaloran — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jalbarragup, Western Australia and Jaloran, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jaloran has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Jalbarragup (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jalbarragup or Jaloran safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jalbarragup has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Jaloran scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jalbarragup scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Jaloran scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jalbarragup or Jaloran?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jaloran has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
